message:
fix(distributed): short-circuit PaneDiscovered events for remote domains

Extract distributed_agent_domain_is_remote() helper and add a dedicated
PaneDiscovered match arm that checks domain prefix before the storage
lookup, preventing spurious remote-domain pane events from being
forwarded to the distributed wire stream. Add unit test verifying zero
wire messages for remote-domain discovered panes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
